examples: However, eyes think that their field is bound and mind is the greatest. Mind flashes boundlessly far away.
A smile seems insignificant but it can be quite rewarding, which can make you and others feel boundlessly amazing.
I am a very lonely person, feel blue occasionally boundlessly, the ends of the earth, endless, full to the brim loneliness.
Slaves transcended oppression and bequeathed to the world a boundlessly rich cultural heritage.
Any sound corporate strategy must assume an almost boundlessly multifaceted regulatory landscape.
